blocks.text: `internal/agentbridge/supervisor` is the daemon-tier RunController. It composes C4 RuntimeActor, C5 Scheduling, C6 Workdir, C2 EventIngestor, and control-plane ports for one task run.

items: Register the RuntimeActor pool with the control-plane source and send heartbeat.
Claim tasks by runtime id and prevent duplicate in-flight task execution.
Use `internal/scheduling` eligibility before provider process spawn.
Prepare task/run workdir and inject native config when a workdir adapter is configured.
Delegate provider events and terminal result drafts to daemon-side `internal/ir/ingest` for canonical append.
Report terminal results through `TaskReporterPort` and clean in-flight runs on stop/cancel.
`riido-task-db.v1` guarded mutation and local task DB lease sidecars.
Project/MWSD sync, local API, SaaS HTTP/SSE transport, or infra/state/secret ownership.
Concrete provider parser, command, or protocol implementation.
Persistent lease registry or fencing-token primitive.
